population: repositories returned by the legacy June 2026 GitHub organisation snapshot
caveat: Not the same population as transformed activity tables.

population: repositories represented in the transformed June 2026 activity tables
caveat: Use for denominators derived from data/repos.csv.

population: transformed GitHub issue and pull-request records
caveat: A record count, not the sum of the legacy summary's separately fetched totals.

population: non-bot logins in the committed contributor snapshot after maintainer-reviewed bot overrides
caveat: Git identities are neither all historical participants nor OBS-T correction submitters.

population: repositories with bus factor 1 among 76 repositories with human contribution rows
caveat: GitHub contribution counts; automation excluded through the curated identity map.

population: OBS-T form and git layers
caveat: Documented events, not an exhaustive history of every edit.

population: dictionaries represented in OBS-T
caveat: One fewer than the current collection inventory.

population: distinct release-safe corrector identities/labels in OBS-T
caveat: Do not describe these labels as 208 people without identity adjudication.

population: OBS-T events whose component was derived rather than left inferred/unattributed
caveat: A provenance proportion, not an accuracy score.

population: content-correction commit authors in csl-orig, 2019–2026
caveat: Measures implementers in git history, not form-era submitters.

population: annual lead corrector share of csl-orig content-correction commits, 2019–2026
caveat: Annual concentration range; not a share of all project labour.

population: current CDSL collection inventory
caveat: Collection count includes reference works; OBS-T covers 43; stats-census workflow status is done.

population: union over the fifteen-dictionary comparison set
caveat: Not a union over all 44 works; stats-census workflow status is done.

population: markup census over the collection
caveat: The rounded 17.5M display is not an exact instance count.

population: dictionaries with usable <ls> citation markup
caveat: Only tagged/canonicalisable citations are represented; stats-census workflow status is done.

population: all unordered pairs among the fifteen-dictionary union set
caveat: Method: count matrix rows; equivalently 15 choose 2.

population: BHS normalized headwords unique within the fifteen-dictionary set
caveat: 10,434 / 17,761 = 58.75%; manuscript rounds to one decimal.

population: CCS normalized headwords unique within the fifteen-dictionary set
caveat: 178 / 28,743 = 0.62%; manuscript rounds to one decimal.

population: MW/PWG intersection in the fifteen-dictionary matrix
caveat: Method: read the unique MW-PWG matrix row; matrix uses normalized k1 headwords.

population: MW headwords in the fifteen-dictionary matrix
caveat: A former draft's unexplained 168,633 population was removed; this current total is not retained in A61.

population: PWG headwords in the fifteen-dictionary matrix
caveat: A former draft's 106,169 total was removed; this current total is not retained in A61.

population: claimed MW/PWG entry-length comparison
caveat: No committed local source, method, or cutoff was found; soften or delete the entire block.

population: claimed MW/PWG source/locus overlap
caveat: Not the 828,505-edge canonical citation graph; soften or delete unless the older computation is recovered.

population: dictionaries represented in the etymology oracle
caveat: Method: dictionaryCount in the frozen JSON.

population: all rows in the ten-dictionary etymology oracle
caveat: The former 62,558 figure was removed; the current source reports 64,896 headwords with roots and 67,172 rows, neither retained in A61.

population: claimed indigenous-tradition agreement on shared items
caveat: No exact selection rule or local result table was attached; soften to a qualitative statement or cite the method.

population: canonical MW root table grouped by verb_type
caveat: The former exact total was removed from A61; 1,363 is only the non-genuineroot class and the current total is 2,113.

population: MW-to-Heritage crosswalk
caveat: Former insufficiently framed exact totals were removed from A61; 25,140 rows are Heritage-covered and 24,549 resolve to anchors.

population: rows in the current MW-Whitney-DCS root crosswalk
caveat: The former 939 figure was removed; the current 935-row total is not retained in A61.

population: MW hiatus exception list
caveat: Method: count nonblank physical rows; 190/190 rows are nonblank data rows.

population: MW print-change audit file
caveat: Method: regex ^\d+\. over 1,011 physical lines; the former 'over 700 entries' claim was removed from A61.
